info.title: Any Managed Agents API
info.description: Control-plane API for Any Managed Agents. Command-line automation uses restish or direct HTTP against this OpenAPI document; runtime traffic flows through AMA runtime proxy endpoints and canonical session events.

content.example: Previous heartbeat checked open PRs and deferred billing export.
Checked stale tasks. Follow up on repo resource migration next heartbeat.

promptTemplate.example: Research current Canadian banking bonus offers.
Research current Canadian banking bonus offers.
Research current Canadian banking bonus offers.

initialPrompt.example: Research Canadian banking bonus offers and summarize current opportunities.

message.example: Please continue the task and summarize the current blocker.

result.description: Caller-provided custom tool result recorded instead of executing the tool

post.summary: Complete OIDC sign-in and create an httpOnly session cookie

200.description: Session created. Sets an httpOnly session cookie.

403.description: Request origin is not in the allowed origins list

get.summary: Discover available login methods for an organization

200.description: Available login methods for the organization

get.summary: List projects in the current organization

post.summary: Create a project in the current organization

get.summary: List external tenant bindings for a project

post.summary: Bind an external issuer tenant to a project

get.description: Resolves active agents in the same project that match the requested role or capability, or the agent handoff policy targets. AMA only resolves candidates; the requesting product decides how a handoff affects its own workflow records.

post.description: Refreshes the model catalog from the provider. Failures return a normalized provider error without credential material and leave the stored provider configuration readable.

patch.summary: Renew or finish a runner lease

get.summary: Open a claimed runner session WebSocket channel

101.description: Runner session channel accepted as a WebSocket upgrade

200.description: Runner session channel metadata for OpenAPI clients

post.summary: Connect or upsert an MCP connector
Call MCP tool through AMA policy boundary

404.description: MCP connection or tool not found

post.summary: Send a command to an active session

get.summary: List pending tool approvals for a session

post.summary: Approve or deny a pending tool call
post.description: Records the human decision for a paused tool call. Approval resumes the runtime and executes the tool (or records the provided custom result); denial resumes the runtime with the denial.

404.description: Session or pending approval not found

patch.summary: Update or revoke vault credential metadata

delete.summary: Delete unused vault credential version metadata
